data.name: Analyzes sleep duration and consistency. Tracks your average sleep time and bedtime stability over the past 30 days.
data.value: Analyses sleep duration and consistency. Tracks your average sleep time and bedtime stability over the past 30 days.

data.name: Average calories per session over the past 42 days.
data.value: Average calories per session over the past 42 days.

data.name: Average calories per session over the past 7 days.
data.value: Average calories per session over the past 7 days.

data.name: Average weight over the past 30 days.
data.value: Average weight over the past 30 days.

data.name: Average weight over the past 7 days.
data.value: Average weight over the past 7 days.

data.name: Computes Fitness (42-day load), Fatigue (7-day load), and Form using the CTL/ATL training-load model. Supports multiple sources.
data.value: Calculates Fitness (42-day load), Fatigue (7-day load), and Form using the CTL/ATL training-load model. Supports multiple sources.

data.name: Configure this plugin to start seeing metrics.
data.value: Configure this plugin to start seeing metrics.

data.name: Consecutive days with at least one record, up to today.
data.value: Consecutive days with at least one record, up to today.

data.name: Days elapsed since the most recent recorded event.
data.value: Days elapsed since the most recent recorded event.

data.name: Exponential moving average (α=0.2). Recent entries weighted more.
data.value: Exponential moving average (α=0.2). Recent entries weighted more.

data.name: Fitness minus Fatigue. Positive = fresh; negative = fatigued.
data.value: Fitness minus Fatigue. Positive = fresh; negative = fatigued.

data.name: How consistent your bedtime is. Higher is more stable.
data.value: How consistent your bedtime is. Higher is more stable.

data.name: Percentage of days in the past 30 days with at least one record.
data.value: Percentage of days in the past 30 days with at least one record.

data.name: Plugins compute derived metrics from your event records. Configure a plugin to activate it.
data.value: Plugins calculate derived metrics from your event records. Configure a plugin to activate it.

data.name: Rate of change over 30 days. Positive = gaining, negative = losing.
data.value: Rate of change over 30 days. Positive = gaining, negative = losing.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 30 days.
data.value: Simple average mood score over the past 30 days.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 7 days.
data.value: Simple average mood score over the past 7 days.

data.name: Standard deviation over the past 30 days. Lower = more stable.
data.value: Standard deviation over the past 30 days. Lower = more stable.

data.name: Tracks body weight with moving averages and a weekly trend direction computed via linear regression over the past 30 days.
data.value: Tracks body weight with moving averages and a weekly trend direction computed via linear regression over the past 30 days.

data.name: Tracks mood trends with an exponential moving average (α=0.2), 7/30-day averages, and 30-day volatility (standard deviation).
data.value: Tracks mood trends with an exponential moving average (α=0.2), 7/30-day averages, and 30-day volatility (standard deviation).

data.name: Tracks self-control for any behavior you want to reduce. Score recovers +10/day (max 100) and halves on each event.
data.value: Tracks self-control for any behaviour you wish to reduce. Score recovers +10/day (max 100) and halves on each event.

data.name: Tracks your daily habit streak, all-time longest streak, and 30-day completion rate. Any day with at least one record counts as a completed day.
data.value: Tracks your daily habit streak, all-time longest streak, and 30-day completion rate. Any day with at least one record counts as a completed day.

data.name: Your average daily sleep duration over the past 30 days.
data.value: Your average daily sleep duration over the past 30 days.
